title: akirby's YouTuber Starter Pack
description: Starter pack for YouTubers with some must-have mods! Available for NeoForge and Fabric!
body:
# ![YouTuber Starter Pack Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bef9464176c6fb13abf8334e65a35159d4e44441_0.webp)
### This modpack is meant to supply content creators with the _**bare minimum**_ yet _**must have**_ mods to get started recording videos. Available for NeoForge and Fabric. Please check which version you are downloading.

## Features
### Performance
This modpack contains mods like Sodium, Dynamic FPS, Clumps and more to improve performance while playing and creating videos!

### Cinematics
Mods like Flashback or Replay Mod are not available for NeoForge. However, mods like CMDCam, Zume, and Motion Capture give us the opportunity to create some great cinematic shots while using NeoForge.

### Quality of Life
This modpack has a couple of mods to make life a bit easier while playing like sorting chests with Inventory Profiles Next or seeing your location with Coordinates Display!

### Better Visuals
Included in this modpack is four optional shader packs for Iris. Anti-Aliasing provides some upgraded Vanilla visuals. BSL Shaders and Complementary Shaders (Reimagined and Unbound) are some of the most downloaded modpacks available for great reason!


<details>
<summary>Mods Included</summary>

## NeoForge And Fabric
- [bad packets](https://modrinth.com/mod/badpackets)
- [BetterF3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3)
- [BoxLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/boxlib)
- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
- [Clumps](https://modrinth.com/mod/clumps)
- [Controlling](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlling)
- [Coordinates Display](https://modrinth.com/mod/coordinates-display)
- [Disable Accessibility Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/disable-accessibility-screen)
- [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps)

- [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast)
- [Inventory Profilles Next](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-profiles-next)

- [libIPN](https://modrinth.com/mod/libipn)

- [Packet Fixer](https://modrinth.com/mod/packet-fixer)
- [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options)
- [Searchables](https://modrinth.com/mod/searchables)
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
- [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra)
- [YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)
- More may be added later!

## Fabric Exclusive
- [Bobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby)
- [Flashback](https://modrinth.com/mod/flashback)
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
- [WI Zoom](https://modrinth.com/mod/wi-zoom)

## NeoForge Exclusive
- [CMDCam](https://modrinth.com/mod/cmdcam)
- [CreativeCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/creativecore)
- [Kotlin For Forge](https://modrinth.com/mod/kotlin-for-forge)

- [Motion Capture](https://modrinth.com/mod/motion-capture)
- [Zume](https://modrinth.com/mod/zume)
